title: Our Last Summer Together
content: Before graduating from university, Ava and Ben spent one final summer in the coastal town where they had met as teenagers. They revisited the beach, rented bicycles, and watched sunsets from the same wooden pier. Everything felt familiar, yet different because they knew their lives were about to change. Instead of feeling sad, they decided to enjoy every remaining day without worrying about the future. By the end of the season, they understood that memories become even more meaningful when we know they cannot be repeated exactly the same way again.
